title: poa secunda var. gracillima
intro: Poa secunda var. gracillima, also known as slender blue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Native American and European folk traditions, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa secunda var. gracillima include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Poa secunda var. gracillima typically involve drying the plant material and infusing it in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed as a treatment for various health conditions.
